props.name: blurStrength
props.description: The intensity of the blur effect (0-20px)

props.name: metalness
props.description: The opacity of the metallic sheen (0-1)

props.name: roughness
props.description: The opacity of the noise texture (0-1)

props.name: displacementStrength
props.description: Strength of the displacement (how much it warps)

props.name: noiseScale
props.description: Scale of the noise texture (size of the ripples)

props.name: glassDistortion
props.description: Strength of the glass edge distortion

props.name: overlayColor
props.description: The color of the overlay tint
